description.p: Read Flow is a local-first document archive organizer for e-books and PDFs. It scans your library, fingerprints and deduplicates files by content, and lets you tag, search, and track reading progress across every source.

Built-in readers cover PDF and EPUB, with support for MOBI, FictionBook, CBZ/CBT, DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/XPS, and documents inside archives. Read Flow can also search and import books from online libraries such as Project Gutenberg and Standard Ebooks.
The same server that powers the desktop app can run headless, so a phone, tablet, or web browser can reach your library through the companion Progressive Web App.
